User.description: Represents a human user within the Operan platform, including authentication and authorization attributes.

tenant_id.description: Unique identifier for the tenant this user belongs to.

email.description: Primary email address for the user.

display_name.description: Human-readable display name for the user.

status.description: Current status of the user account.

role_ids.description: List of role IDs assigned to the user.

permissions.description: Explicit permissions granted to the user.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the user record was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the user record was last updated.

last_login_at.description: Timestamp of the user's most recent successful login.

authentication_method.description: Primary authentication method used by the user.

mfa_enabled.description: Indicates whether multi-factor authentication is enabled for the user.

Identity.description: Represents a non-human identity such as a service, agent, or system within the Operan platform.

tenant_id.description: Unique identifier for the tenant this identity belongs to.

status.description: Current operational status of the identity.

credentials.description: Credential metadata associated with this identity.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the credentials were created.

expires_at.description: Timestamp when the credentials will expire.

last_used_at.description: Timestamp when the credentials were last used.

metadata.description: Arbitrary key-value metadata associated with this identity.

Permission.description: Defines a granular permission within the Operan platform, specifying what actions can be performed on resources.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this permission allows.

scope.description: The scope boundary within which this permission applies.

resource_type.description: The type of resource this permission applies to.

action.description: The action this permission grants on the resource.

condition.description: Optional ABAC (Attribute-Based Access Control) expression that must evaluate to true for this permission to be active.

assigned_to.description: List of entity IDs (users, roles, or identities) to which this permission is directly assigned.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the permission was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the permission was last updated.

Session.description: Represents an active or historical authentication session for a user.

tenant_id.description: Unique identifier for the tenant this session belongs to.

user_id.description: Unique identifier for the user who owns this session.

auth_method.description: Authentication method used to establish this session.

ip_address.description: IP address from which the session was initiated.

user_agent.description: User-Agent header string from the client that initiated the session.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the session was created.

expires_at.description: Timestamp when the session will expire.

last_activity_at.description: Timestamp of the last activity recorded for this session.

device_fingerprint.description: Hash or unique identifier representing the device that initiated the session.

Role.description: Represents a named collection of permissions that can be assigned to users, services, or agents.

tenant_id.description: Unique identifier for the tenant this role belongs to.

name.description: Unique name of the role within the tenant.

description.description: Human-readable description of the role's purpose.

permission_ids.description: List of permission IDs included in this role.

assignable_to.description: Entity types that can be assigned this role.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the role was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the role was last updated.

SSOConfig.description: Represents a single sign-on configuration for a tenant, defining the identity provider and protocol settings.

id.description: Unique identifier for the SSO configuration.

tenant_id.description: Unique identifier for the tenant this SSO configuration applies to.

type.description: The SSO protocol used by this configuration.

metadata_url.description: URL to the identity provider's metadata document.

redirect_uri.description: Callback URL for the SSO flow.

status.description: Whether this SSO configuration is currently enabled.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the SSO configuration was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the SSO configuration was last updated.

AuditLog.description: Records an auditable event within the Operan platform for compliance and security monitoring.

id.description: Unique identifier for the audit log entry.

tenant_id.description: Unique identifier for the tenant this audit log entry belongs to.

actor_id.description: Unique identifier of the entity (user or identity) that performed the action.

resource_type.description: The type of resource the action was performed on.

resource_id.description: Unique identifier of the resource the action was performed on.

ip_address.description: IP address from which the action was performed.

user_agent.description: User-Agent header string from the client that performed the action.

metadata.description: Additional contextual information about the audit event.

timestamp.description: Timestamp when the auditable event occurred.

severity.description: Severity level of the audit event.

SCIMUser.description: Represents a user managed via SCIM (System for Cross-domain Identity Management) provisioning.

id.description: Unique identifier for the SCIM-managed user.

userName.description: Unique login identifier for the user.

displayName.description: Human-readable display name for the user.

primary.description: Whether this is the primary email address.

emails.description: List of email addresses associated with the user.

roles.description: List of role identifiers assigned to the user.

active.description: Whether the user is currently active.

meta.description: SCIM metadata about the resource lifecycle.

created.description: Timestamp when the resource was created.

lastModified.description: Timestamp of the last modification to the resource.

ErrorResponse.description: Standard error response format used across the Operan Identity & Access Management API.

code.description: Machine-readable error code for programmatic handling.

message.description: Human-readable error message describing what went wrong.

details.description: Optional structured details providing additional context about the error.
